---
name: Documentation page
about: Propose or update a documentation page.
title: "Docs: "
labels: ["type:doc"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should this documentation help the reader decide or understand?

## Deliverable

Target path:

```text
docs/[section]/[page].md
```

## Scope

- Reader problem:
- Requirement, component, method, or practice area:
- Out of scope:

## Acceptance Checklist

- [ ] The page has a clear purpose and "when this matters" context.
- [ ] The page includes questions to ask or decision guidance.
- [ ] Trade-offs are explicit.
- [ ] Common mistakes or review prompts are included when useful.
- [ ] At least one original example is included when useful.
- [ ] Related pages are linked.
- [ ] Content follows `CONTENT_GUARDRAILS.md` and does not copy or closely paraphrase external material.
- [ ] Available checks are run, or missing checks are noted.
